name: sc-js
description: JS knowledge provider: detects runtime (web/desktop), framework (Nuxt/Vue/SvelteKit/Alpine/Vite/Astro), ORMs and capabilities, then emits a pivot manifeste. /sc-js:audit delegates code review to aidd-dev:reviewer. improve, legacy (Vue 2→3, ESM, TS), teach (composables, reactivity, async). Perf/data pivots for web-optimize and data-optimize.
